log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE executable (32KB) tagged as a 'spreader' with an overlay. It uses DxPack packer and Obsidium protector. I need to gather more IOC data to understand the full scope of the threat. I'

The IOC summary shows no network activity, no persistence keys, no mutexes, and only 1 dropped file (the sample itself). This suggests the sample is a dropper/spreader that may not have fully executed

The dropped files list only shows the sample itself (zbhnd.exe), which is expected since it's a dropper/spreader. I need to investigate the process activity to see what processes were spawned and what
